ok, so this is a quick video on how to use the new feature in Google Chrome called tab groups. So this is a feature that's been in Chrome for a while, but it's now available to everyone. So what it does is it allows you to group tabs together. So if you have a lot of tabs open, you can group them together and then you can collapse them or expand them. So it's a great way to organize your tabs and keep your browser clean.

So to use tab groups, you first need to make sure that you have the latest version of Chrome. So to do that, you can go to the three dots in the top right corner of Chrome, go to help, and then go to about Google Chrome. And then it will automatically update Chrome for you.

Once you have the latest version of Chrome, you can then start using tab groups. So to do that, you can right-click on any tab and then you'll see an option called add tab to new group. So you can click on that, and then it will create a new group for you. And then you can name the group whatever you want. So I'm going to call this one work. And then you can also choose a color for the group. So I'm going to choose blue.

And then once you have your group created, you can then start adding tabs to it. So to do that, you can just drag and drop tabs into the group. So I'm going to drag this one into the work group. And then you can also add new tabs to the group by right-clicking on the group and then going to new tab in group. So that will create a new tab in the group for you.

And then once you have your tabs in the group, you can then collapse them or expand them. So to collapse them, you can just click on the group name. And then it will collapse all the tabs in the group. And then to expand them, you can just click on the group name again. And then it will expand all the tabs in the group.

So it's a great way to organize your tabs and keep your browser clean. And then you can also move groups around by just dragging and dropping them. So I'm going to drag this work group to the left. And then you can also close groups by right-clicking on the group and then going to close group. So that will close all the tabs in the group.

So that's how you use tab groups in Google Chrome. It's a great feature that can help you stay organized and keep your browser clean. So I hope this video was helpful. If you have any questions, please let me know in the comments below. And then I'll see you in the next video.
